steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the best description of the overall structure of the text. Map what each part does: the first three sentences introduce a customization trend and its benefits; the final sentence (signaled by Still) introduces a challenge companies face.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'several recent innovations in product manufacturing': the passage discusses one trend (customization), not multiple manufacturing innovations. ✗
  • Choice B — 'a company’s recent success': no single company is described, and no specific company’s success story is told. ✗
  • Choice C — 'two contrasting product-marketing techniques': the passage does not compare two marketing techniques or give examples of one of them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'introduces a trend in consumer products and then explains how the trend both benefits and poses a challenge to companies': the first three sentences introduce the customization trend and explain that companies profit and consumers pay more; the final sentence introduces the challenge of keeping costs low. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
